Chef Cheng Koung Meng

Premium Catering & Event Logistics

Trusted by over 10,000 clients. We provide exquisite banquet catering and comprehensive event setups, ensuring a flawless dining experience for your most important occasions.

Call Now Consultation
60+ Years of Culinary Heritage
10k+ Client Testimonials
24H Seamless Setup
100% Hygiene Standard

Catering & Event Services

Comprehensive Venue Setup

We provide end-to-end event preparations. From elegant outdoor tents to reliable power setups, we create the perfect environment for your banquet regardless of outdoor conditions.

Premium Cold Chain Control

Maintaining the utmost freshness. Our dedicated cold logistics ensure that premium seafood and meats arrive in pristine condition, preserving their natural flavors for the final dish.

Flawless Banquet Execution

Adhering to strict physical segregation between raw and cooked foods. Through precise temperature control and efficient service flow, we guarantee hot, simultaneous food delivery for banquets exceeding 100 tables.

Banquet Menu Signatures

Assorted Appetizer Platter

Six classic cold starters, portioned and temperature-controlled to begin the service efficiently without overwhelming the palate.

Deep-Fried Fish Fillet

Batch-fried at exact temperatures to maintain a crispy exterior and preserve internal moisture during high-volume service.

Khmer Style Beef Salad

Freshly prepared with authentic Khmer spices, providing a high-acid, refreshing contrast to heavy banquet proteins.

Cereal Butter Prawns

Wild-caught prawns wok-tossed in butter and cereal flakes, utilizing high heat for rapid execution and flavor.

Roasted Suckling Pig with Bread

Traditional suckling pig roasted with strict temperature control to ensure a consistent crispy skin, served with soft bread.

Sweet & Sour Fish

Crispy fried whole fish coated in a standardized sweet and sour glaze, engineered to hold its texture during transit.

Spicy Stir-Fried Fish Fillet

High-heat wok execution to seal the fish quickly and infuse consistent, fiery aromatics across every batch.

Abalone Herb Broth

Slow-simmered in large batches using precise ratios of abalone and herbs to ensure a consistent, temperature-stable hot soup.

Spicy Duck Feet Salad

Hand-deboned duck feet prepared under strict hygiene controls, tossed in a sharp vinaigrette for a clean palate reset.

Steamed Fish with Premium Soy

Steamed on a strict timer to prevent overcooking, served with a standardized soy sauce base.

Lotus Leaf Fragrant Rice

Wok-fried rice steamed in lotus leaves, a reliable carbohydrate staple that holds heat exceptionally well during service.

Hong Kong Style Roast Duck

Batch-roasted using traditional techniques to render fat evenly, ensuring the meat stays moist until plated.

Traditional Khmer Desserts

Fresh coconut milk and pandan prepared with strict sanitation protocols to securely close the meal.

Tom Yum River Prawn Soup

A robust, high-acid soup base that retains its heat and flavor profile perfectly from the kitchen to the table.

Signature Whole Roasted Pig

The centerpiece of large banquets, requiring exact timing and heat management to deliver a crispy, uniform finish.
